name: COLITIS CYSTICA PROFUNDA
definition: rare benign chronic condition characterized by dilated sub- mucosal mucin-filled cysts lined

demographics.Associated with: solitary rectal ulcer syndrome (as localized polypoid variant)

dominant_finding: nodular polypoid / cauliflower-like lesions < 2 cm in size, containing no gas
discriminating_features: nodular polypoid / cauliflower-like lesions < 2 cm in size, containing no gas
spiculations mimicking ulcers (barium-filled clefts between nodules)

general: nodular polypoid / cauliflower-like lesions < 2 cm in size, containing no gas
spiculations mimicking ulcers (barium-filled clefts between nodules)
